title: Inflation Escalation Calculator
description: Industrial-grade tool to compute the impact of inflation on material, labor, energy, and overhead costs over a specified period, with escalation factors and confidence adjustments.

inputs.label: Base Cost (Current Period)
inputs.businessContext: Total cost of goods or services at the start of the analysis period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total cost of goods or services at the start of the analysis period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Analiz dönemi başlangıcındaki toplam mal veya hizmet maliyeti.

inputs.label: Annual Inflation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual inflation rate for the cost category (e.g., CPI, PPI).

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual inflation rate for the cost category (e.g., CPI, PPI).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Maliyet kategorisi için beklenen yıllık enflasyon oranı (örn. TÜFE, ÜFE).

inputs.label: Analysis Period (Years)
inputs.businessContext: Number of years over which inflation escalation is calculated.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of years over which inflation escalation is calculated.

inputs.label: Escalation Method
inputs.businessContext: Method to apply inflation: compound (annual compounding), simple (linear), or stepwise (discrete annual steps).

businessContext_i18n.en: Method to apply inflation: compound (annual compounding), simple (linear), or stepwise (discrete annual steps).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Enflasyonu uygulama yöntemi: bileşik (yıllık bileşik), basit (doğrusal) veya adımlı (ayrık yıllık adımlar).

inputs.label: Include Energy Cost Escalation
inputs.businessContext: If true, applies a separate energy escalation factor (typically higher than general inflation).

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, applies a separate energy escalation factor (typically higher than general inflation).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğruysa, ayrı bir enerji artış faktörü uygular (genellikle genel enflasyondan yüksektir).

inputs.label: Energy Escalation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual escalation rate for energy costs, often based on EIA forecasts.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual escalation rate for energy costs, often based on EIA forecasts.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Enerji maliyetleri için yıllık artış oranı, genellikle EIA tahminlerine dayanır.

inputs.label: Labor Productivity Gain
inputs.businessContext: Annual productivity improvement that offsets labor cost inflation (Lean / Six Sigma metric).

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual productivity improvement that offsets labor cost inflation (Lean / Six Sigma metric).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İşgücü maliyeti enflasyonunu dengeleyen yıllık verimlilik iyileştirmesi (Yalın / Altı Sigma metriği).

inputs.label: Material Volatility Index
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier to adjust material inflation based on commodity volatility (e.g., copper, steel).

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier to adjust material inflation based on commodity volatility (e.g., copper, steel).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Emtia oynaklığına (örn. bakır, çelik) dayalı malzeme enflasyonunu ayarlamak için çarpan.

rules.message: Energy escalation rate should typically be >= general inflation rate when energy is included.
Analysis period must be at least 1 year.
Material volatility index must be between 0.5 and 3.0.

thresholds.alert: Inflation rate exceeds 10% – consider hedging strategies.
Negative productivity gain will amplify labor cost escalation.
Long analysis period (>20 years) increases uncertainty – use scenario analysis.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
